ddl.value: ("latitude" is null and "longitude" is null) or ("latitude" is not null and "longitude" is not null)
ddl.name: sites_coordinates_pair_check

ddl.value: ("latitude" is null and "longitude" is null and "geocoding_provider" is null and "geocoded_at" is null) or ("latitude" is not null and "longitude" is not null and "geocoding_provider" is not null and "geocoded_at" is not null)
ddl.name: sites_geocoding_metadata_check

ddl.value: ("status" = 'blocked' and "blocked_reason" is not null) or ("status" <> 'blocked' and "blocked_reason" is null)
ddl.name: work_items_blocked_reason_matches_status_chk

ddl.value: ("status" = 'completed' and "completed_at" is not null) or ("status" <> 'completed' and "completed_at" is null)
ddl.name: work_items_completed_at_matches_status_chk

ddl.value: ("status" = 'completed' and "completed_by_user_id" is not null) or ("status" <> 'completed' and "completed_by_user_id" is null)
ddl.name: work_items_completed_by_matches_status_chk
